name: localized_color_focus
description: Creates and saves a concrete overview artifact that marks up to six candidate local regions with numbered boxes and matching zoomed crops to support downstream color identification of a referenced object or clothing item. The tool is defensive on normal inputs and always writes a real PNG artifact under artifacts/ before returning.
applicability_conditions: Creates and saves a concrete overview artifact that marks up to six candidate local regions with numbered boxes and matching zoomed crops to support downstream color identification of a referenced object or clothing item.
